```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 1: SETUP AND LIBRARIES
# =========================================================

library(gbm)
library(caret)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)


data <- read.csv(
  "C:/Users/matth/OneDrive/Desktop/Books/Thesis/Data/freMTPL2freq.csv",
  header = TRUE
)

df <- data %>%
  mutate(
    ClaimFreq = ClaimNb / Exposure,
    VehBrand  = as.factor(VehBrand),
    VehGas    = as.factor(VehGas),
    Area      = as.factor(Area),
    Region    = as.factor(Region)
  )
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 2: EVALUATION FUNCTIONS
# =========================================================

poisson_deviance <- function(y, mu) {
  mu   <- pmax(mu, 1e-10)
  term <- ifelse(
    y == 0,
    mu,
    y * log(y / mu) - (y - mu)
  )
  2 * sum(term)
}

poisson_deviance_per_obs <- function(y, mu) {
  poisson_deviance(y, mu) / length(y)
}

rmse <- function(y, yhat) {
  sqrt(mean((y - yhat)^2))
}

extract_cv_deviance <- function(gbm_model, best_iter, n_train) {
  cv_dev_per_obs <- gbm_model$cv.error[best_iter]
  cv_dev_scaled  <- cv_dev_per_obs * n_train
  return(list(
    per_obs = cv_dev_per_obs,
    scaled  = cv_dev_scaled
  ))
}

convergence_check <- function(best_iter, max_trees) {
  if (best_iter == max_trees) {
    cat(
      "WARNING: Model did NOT converge.",
      "Best iteration equals tree limit.\n",
      "Reported performance is a lower bound.\n"
    )
  } else {
    cat(
      "Model converged at iteration",
      best_iter, "out of", max_trees, "\n"
    )
  }
}

evaluate_hybrid <- function(
    model_name,
    gbm_model,
    best_iter,
    max_trees,
    train_pred,
    test_pred,
    glm_test_pred,
    y_train,
    y_test
) {
  
  cat("\n========================================\n")
  cat("EVALUATION:", model_name, "\n")
  cat("========================================\n")
  
  # Convergence
  convergence_check(best_iter, max_trees)
  
  # CV Deviance
  cv_info <- extract_cv_deviance(
    gbm_model, best_iter, length(y_train)
  )
  cat("\nCV Deviance (per obs):   ",
      round(cv_info$per_obs, 6), "\n")
  cat("CV Deviance (scaled):    ",
      round(cv_info$scaled, 2), "\n")
  
  # Train Deviance
  train_dev     <- poisson_deviance(y_train, train_pred)
  train_dev_obs <- poisson_deviance_per_obs(y_train, train_pred)
  cat("\nTrain Deviance:          ",
      round(train_dev, 2), "\n")
  cat("Train Deviance (per obs):",
      round(train_dev_obs, 6), "\n")
  
  # Train/CV Gap
  gap <- cv_info$per_obs - train_dev_obs
  cat("\nTrain/CV Gap (per obs):  ",
      round(gap, 6),
      "(positive = overfitting)\n")
  
  # GLM Baseline
  glm_test_dev  <- poisson_deviance(y_test, glm_test_pred)
  glm_test_rmse <- rmse(y_test, glm_test_pred)
  cat("\n--- GLM Baseline (Stage 1) ---\n")
  cat("Test Deviance:           ",
      round(glm_test_dev, 2), "\n")
  cat("Test Deviance (per obs): ",
      round(glm_test_dev / length(y_test), 6), "\n")
  cat("Test RMSE:               ",
      round(glm_test_rmse, 6), "\n")
  
  # Hybrid Performance
  hybrid_test_dev  <- poisson_deviance(y_test, test_pred)
  hybrid_test_rmse <- rmse(y_test, test_pred)
  cat("\n--- Hybrid Model (Stage 1 + Stage 2) ---\n")
  cat("Test Deviance:           ",
      round(hybrid_test_dev, 2), "\n")
  cat("Test Deviance (per obs): ",
      round(hybrid_test_dev / length(y_test), 6), "\n")
  cat("Test RMSE:               ",
      round(hybrid_test_rmse, 6), "\n")
  
  # Improvement over GLM
  improvement     <- glm_test_dev - hybrid_test_dev
  improvement_pct <- 100 * improvement / glm_test_dev
  cat("\nImprovement over GLM:    ",
      round(improvement, 2),
      "(", round(improvement_pct, 3), "%)\n")
  
  return(data.frame(
    Model             = model_name,
    Best_Iter         = best_iter,
    Converged         = (best_iter < max_trees),
    CV_Dev_per_obs    = round(cv_info$per_obs, 6),
    Train_Dev_per_obs = round(train_dev_obs, 6),
    TrainCV_Gap       = round(gap, 6),
    GLM_Test_Dev      = round(glm_test_dev, 2),
    Hybrid_Test_Dev   = round(hybrid_test_dev, 2),
    GLM_Test_RMSE     = round(glm_test_rmse, 6),
    Hybrid_Test_RMSE  = round(hybrid_test_rmse, 6),
    Improvement_pct   = round(improvement_pct, 3)
  ))
}

```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 3: TRAIN/TEST SPLIT
# =========================================================

set.seed(123)
train_index <- createDataPartition(
  df$ClaimNb,
  p    = 0.80,
  list = FALSE
)

train <- df[train_index, ]
test  <- df[-train_index, ]

# Log transform Density
train$LogDensity <- log1p(train$Density)
test$LogDensity  <- log1p(test$Density)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 4: MODEL 1 - HYBRID WITH DENSITY
# =========================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# STAGE 1: GLM WITH DENSITY
# ---------------------------------------------------------

glm_density <- glm(
  ClaimNb ~
    VehPower +
    VehAge +
    DrivAge +
    BonusMalus +
    VehBrand +
    VehGas +
    Area +
    LogDensity +
    Region,
  family = poisson(link = "log"),
  offset = log(Exposure),
  data   = train
)

train$glm_link_density <- predict(
  glm_density,
  newdata = train,
  type    = "link"
) - log(train$Exposure)

test$glm_link_density <- predict(
  glm_density,
  newdata = test,
  type    = "link"
) - log(test$Exposure)

train$glm_pred_density <- predict(
  glm_density,
  newdata = train,
  type    = "response"
)

test$glm_pred_density <- predict(
  glm_density,
  newdata = test,
  type    = "response"
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# STAGE 2: GBM WITH DENSITY
# ---------------------------------------------------------

gbm_density <- gbm(
  ClaimNb ~
    offset(log(Exposure) + glm_link_density) +
    VehPower +
    VehAge +
    DrivAge +
    BonusMalus +
    VehBrand +
    VehGas +
    Area +
    LogDensity +
    Region,
  distribution      = "poisson",
  data              = train,
  n.trees           = 12000,
  interaction.depth = 5,
  shrinkage         = 0.010,
  bag.fraction      = 0.7,
  n.minobsinnode    = 100,
  cv.folds          = 5,
  verbose           = FALSE
)

best_iter_density <- gbm.perf(
  gbm_density,
  method = "cv"
)


```



```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 5: MODEL 2 - HYBRID WITHOUT DENSITY
# =========================================================

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# STAGE 1: GLM WITHOUT DENSITY
# ---------------------------------------------------------

glm_no_density <- glm(
  ClaimNb ~
    VehPower +
    VehAge +
    DrivAge +
    BonusMalus +
    VehBrand +
    VehGas +
    Area +
    Region,
  family = poisson(link = "log"),
  offset = log(Exposure),
  data   = train
)

train$glm_link_no_density <- predict(
  glm_no_density,
  newdata = train,
  type    = "link"
) - log(train$Exposure)

test$glm_link_no_density <- predict(
  glm_no_density,
  newdata = test,
  type    = "link"
) - log(test$Exposure)

train$glm_pred_no_density <- predict(
  glm_no_density,
  newdata = train,
  type    = "response"
)

test$glm_pred_no_density <- predict(
  glm_no_density,
  newdata = test,
  type    = "response"
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# STAGE 2: GBM WITHOUT DENSITY
# ---------------------------------------------------------

gbm_no_density <- gbm(
  ClaimNb ~
    offset(log(Exposure) + glm_link_no_density) +
    VehPower +
    VehAge +
    DrivAge +
    BonusMalus +
    VehBrand +
    VehGas +
    Area +
    Region,
  distribution      = "poisson",
  data              = train,
  n.trees           = 12000,
  interaction.depth = 5,
  shrinkage         = 0.01,
  bag.fraction      = 0.7,
  n.minobsinnode    = 100,
  cv.folds          = 5,
  verbose           = FALSE
)

best_iter_no_density <- gbm.perf(
  gbm_no_density,
  method = "cv"
)


```




```{r}
# =========================================================
# CHUNK 6: FINAL COMPARISON TABLE
# =========================================================

final_table <- rbind(
  results_density,
  results_no_density
)

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("FINAL COMPARISON TABLE\n")
cat("========================================\n")
print(final_table, row.names = FALSE)
```



---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#Graphs
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------






```{r}
library(dplyr)

decile_df <- data.frame(
  Actual = test$ClaimNb,
  Predicted = test_pred_density
)

decile_df <- decile_df %>%
  mutate(
    Decile = ntile(Predicted, 10)
  )

calibration <- decile_df %>%
  group_by(Decile) %>%
  summarise(
    Actual = mean(Actual),
    Predicted = mean(Predicted)
  )

calibration_long <- pivot_longer(
  calibration,
  cols = c(Actual, Predicted),
  names_to = "Type",
  values_to = "Claims"
)

ggplot(
  calibration_long,
  aes(
    x = Decile,
    y = Claims,
    color = Type
  )
) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    title = "Observed vs Predicted Claims by Risk Decile",
    x = "Predicted Risk Decile",
    y = "Average Claim Count"
  )
```



```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

imp_density <- summary(gbm_density, plotit = FALSE)
imp_no_density <- summary(gbm_no_density, plotit = FALSE)

names(imp_density) <- c("Variable", "Importance")
names(imp_no_density) <- c("Variable", "Importance")

imp_density$Model <- "With Density"
imp_no_density$Model <- "Without Density"

importance_df <- bind_rows(
  imp_density,
  imp_no_density
)

hyb_var_plot <-  ggplot(
    importance_df,
    aes(
      x = reorder(Variable, Importance),
      y = Importance,
      fill = Model
    )
  ) +
    geom_col(
      position = "dodge"
    ) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(
      title = "Variable Importance Comparison",
      x = "",
      y = "Relative Influence (%)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "top"
    )
  
  ggsave(
    "Figure8_Hybrid_Variable_Importance.pdf",
    plot = hyb_var_plot,
    width = 8,
    height = 6
  )
```



```{r}
library(dplyr)

calibration <- data.frame(
  observed = test$ClaimNb,
  predicted = test_pred_no_density
)

calibration <- calibration %>%
  mutate(
    decile = ntile(predicted, 10)
  ) %>%
  group_by(decile) %>%
  summarise(
    Observed = mean(observed),
    Predicted = mean(predicted)
  )

ggplot(
  calibration,
  aes(
    x = Predicted,
    y = Observed
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_abline(
    slope = 1,
    intercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Calibration Plot: Hybrid WITHOUT Density",
    x = "Predicted Frequency",
    y = "Observed Frequency"
  )
```

```{r}
# =============================================================================
# HYBRID MODEL — ALL PLOTS FOR SECTION 5.4
# =============================================================================

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(gbm)

# =============================================================================
# FIGURE 6: LEARNING CURVES
# =============================================================================

png(
  "figure6_learning_curves.png",
  width  = 1400,
  height = 600,
  res    = 150
)

par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(5, 5, 4, 2))

gbm.perf(gbm_density,    method = "cv")
title(main = "Hybrid WITH Density")

gbm.perf(gbm_no_density, method = "cv")
title(main = "Hybrid WITHOUT Density")

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
dev.off()

cat("Figure 6 saved.\n")

# =============================================================================
# FIGURE 7: TEST DEVIANCE COMPARISON BAR CHART
# =============================================================================

n_test <- length(test$ClaimNb)

fig7_df <- data.frame(
  Model = c(
    "GLM\n(With Density)",
    "GLM\n(Without Density)",
    "Hybrid\n(With Density)",
    "Hybrid\n(Without Density)"
  ),
  Deviance = c(
    poisson_deviance(test$ClaimNb, test$glm_pred_density)    / n_test,
    poisson_deviance(test$ClaimNb, test$glm_pred_no_density) / n_test,
    poisson_deviance(test$ClaimNb, test_pred_density)        / n_test,
    poisson_deviance(test$ClaimNb, test_pred_no_density)     / n_test
  ),
  Type = c("GLM Baseline", "GLM Baseline", "Hybrid", "Hybrid")
)

# Order bars by deviance descending (worst to best left to right)
fig7_df$Model <- factor(
  fig7_df$Model,
  levels = fig7_df$Model[order(fig7_df$Deviance, decreasing = TRUE)]
)

fig7 <- ggplot(fig7_df,
               aes(x = Model, y = Deviance, fill = Type)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.55) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(Deviance, 5)),
    vjust = -0.5,
    size  = 3.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "GLM Baseline" = "#B0C4DE",
    "Hybrid"       = "#2F4F7F"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0.295, 0.320),
    oob    = scales::squish,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10, colour = "grey40")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Test-Set Poisson Deviance per Observation",
    subtitle = "Hybrid vs GLM baseline — With and Without Density",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Poisson Deviance (per obs)",
    fill     = "Model Type"
  )

ggsave(
  "figure7_deviance_comparison.png",
  fig7,
  width  = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi    = 150
)

cat("Figure 7 saved.\n")

# =============================================================================
# FIGURE 8: VARIABLE IMPORTANCE — SIDE BY SIDE
# =============================================================================

imp_with <- summary(
  gbm_density,
  n.trees = best_iter_density,
  plotit  = FALSE
)

imp_without <- summary(
  gbm_no_density,
  n.trees = best_iter_no_density,
  plotit  = FALSE
)

colnames(imp_with)    <- c("Variable", "Influence")
colnames(imp_without) <- c("Variable", "Influence")

imp_with$Model    <- "With Density"
imp_without$Model <- "Without Density"

imp_df <- rbind(imp_with, imp_without)

# Reorder variables within each facet by influence
imp_df <- imp_df %>%
  group_by(Model) %>%
  mutate(Variable = reorder(Variable, Influence)) %>%
  ungroup()

fig8 <- ggplot(imp_df,
               aes(x    = Variable,
                   y    = Influence,
                   fill = Model)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE, width = 0.65) +
  facet_wrap(~ Model, scales = "free_y") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "With Density"    = "#2F4F7F",
    "Without Density" = "#5F8FA0"
  )) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10, colour = "grey40")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "GBM Stage Variable Importance",
    subtitle = "Relative influence (%) — Hybrid WITH vs WITHOUT Density",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Relative Influence (%)"
  )

ggsave(
  "figure8_variable_importance.png",
  fig8,
  width  = 11,
  height = 5,
  dpi    = 150
)

cat("Figure 8 saved.\n")

# =============================================================================
# FIGURE 9a: PARTIAL DEPENDENCE PLOTS — CONTINUOUS PREDICTORS
# BonusMalus, VehAge, VehPower
# =============================================================================

continuous_vars <- c("BonusMalus", "VehAge", "VehPower")

pdp_list <- lapply(continuous_vars, function(var) {
  pd <- plot(
    gbm_no_density,
    i.var        = var,
    n.trees      = best_iter_no_density,
    return.grid  = TRUE
  )
  colnames(pd) <- c("x", "y")
  pd$Variable  <- var
  pd$x         <- as.numeric(pd$x)
  pd
})

pdp_df <- do.call(rbind, pdp_list)

# Nice facet labels
pdp_df$Variable <- factor(
  pdp_df$Variable,
  levels = c("BonusMalus", "VehAge", "VehPower"),
  labels = c("BonusMalus", "Vehicle Age", "Vehicle Power")
)

fig9a <- ggplot(pdp_df,
                aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_line(colour = "#2F4F7F", linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_rug(
    sides  = "b",
    alpha  = 0.15,
    colour = "grey50",
    length = unit(0.03, "npc")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Variable, scales = "free_x") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, colour = "grey40")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Partial Dependence Plots — Continuous Predictors",
    subtitle = "Hybrid WITHOUT Density model; marginal effect on log claim rate",
    x        = "Predictor Value",
    y        = "Partial Effect (log scale)"
  )

ggsave(
  "figure9a_pdp_continuous.png",
  fig9a,
  width  = 12,
  height = 4,
  dpi    = 150
)

cat("Figure 9a saved.\n")

# =============================================================================
# FIGURE 9b: PARTIAL DEPENDENCE PLOT — VehBrand (CATEGORICAL)
# =============================================================================

pdp_brand <- plot(
  gbm_no_density,
  i.var       = "VehBrand",
  n.trees     = best_iter_no_density,
  return.grid = TRUE
)

colnames(pdp_brand) <- c("VehBrand", "y")
pdp_brand$VehBrand  <- as.character(pdp_brand$VehBrand)

fig9b <- ggplot(pdp_brand,
                aes(x    = reorder(VehBrand, y),
                    y    = y)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2F4F7F", width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(y, 3)),
    hjust = ifelse(pdp_brand$y[order(pdp_brand$y)] >= 0, -0.1, 1.1),
    size  = 3.2
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10, colour = "grey40")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Partial Dependence Plot — Vehicle Brand",
    subtitle = "Hybrid WITHOUT Density model; marginal effect on log claim rate",
    x        = "Vehicle Brand",
    y        = "Partial Effect (log scale)"
  )

ggsave(
  "figure9b_pdp_vehbrand.png",
  fig9b,
  width  = 7,
  height = 5,
  dpi    = 150
)

cat("Figure 9b saved.\n")

# =============================================================================
# FIGURE 10: DECILE CALIBRATION — BOTH HYBRID MODELS
# =============================================================================

make_calibration <- function(actual, predicted, model_label) {
  df <- data.frame(
    Actual    = actual,
    Predicted = predicted
  )
  df$Decile <- ntile(df$Predicted, 10)

  df %>%
    group_by(Decile) %>%
    summarise(
      Observed  = mean(Actual),
      Predicted = mean(Predicted),
      .groups   = "drop"
    ) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols      = c(Observed, Predicted),
      names_to  = "Type",
      values_to = "Value"
    ) %>%
    mutate(Model = model_label)
}

calib_with    <- make_calibration(
  test$ClaimNb,
  test_pred_density,
  "With Density"
)

calib_without <- make_calibration(
  test$ClaimNb,
  test_pred_no_density,
  "Without Density"
)

calib_all <- rbind(calib_with, calib_without)

fig10 <- ggplot(calib_all,
                aes(x        = Decile,
                    y        = Value,
                    colour   = Type,
                    linetype = Type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.0) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ Model) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(
    "Observed"  = "#2F4F7F",
    "Predicted" = "#E07B39"
  )) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
    "Observed"  = "solid",
    "Predicted" = "dashed"
  )) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:10) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    plot.subtitle   = element_text(size = 10, colour = "grey40")
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Decile Calibration Plot",
    subtitle = "Mean observed vs predicted claim frequency by risk decile",
    x        = "Predicted Risk Decile",
    y        = "Mean Claim Frequency",
    colour   = NULL,
    linetype = NULL
  )

ggsave(
  "figure10_calibration.png",
  fig10,
  width  = 10,
  height = 5,
  dpi    = 150
)

cat("Figure 10 saved.\n")

# =============================================================================
# CONFIRMATION
# =============================================================================

cat("\n--- All figures saved ---\n")
cat("figure6_learning_curves.png\n")
cat("figure7_deviance_comparison.png\n")
cat("figure8_variable_importance.png\n")
cat("figure9a_pdp_continuous.png\n")
cat("figure9b_pdp_vehbrand.png\n")
cat("figure10_calibration.png\n")
```
